mapper.select: SELECT survey_id , survey_name , description , survey_type_code , reg_dt , upd_dt , use_yn FROM tbl_survey WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT survey_id , survey_name , description , survey_type_code , reg_dt , upd_dt , use_yn FROM tbl_survey WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
SELECT survey_id , survey_name , description , survey_type_code , reg_dt , upd_dt , use_yn FROM tbl_survey WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND survey_type_code = #{surveyTypeCode} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_survey SET use_yn = 'N' , upd_dt = NOW() WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT S.SURVEY_ID , S.SURVEY_NAME , S.DESCRIPTION , S.SURVEY_TYPE_CODE , S.REG_DT , R.RESPONSE_ID , R.COMPLETED_AT , R.STATUS_CODE , R.TOTAL_PARTICIPANTS FROM TBL_SURVEY S LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.response_id , r.survey_id , r.start_at , r.completed_at , r.status_code , r.total_score , r.risk_profile_code , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_user_survey_response WHERE survey_id = r.survey_id ) AS total_participants FROM tbl_user_survey_response r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.response_id = ( SELECT response_id FROM tbl_user_survey_response WHERE user_id = r.user_id AND survey_id = r.survey_id ORDER BY reg_dt DESC LIMIT 1 ) ) R ON S.SURVEY_ID = R.SURVEY_ID WHERE S.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY S.REG_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SURVEY S WHERE S.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND (S.SURVEY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR S.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
